label: German retail volume
decision_reason: Monthly real-activity/purchasing-power proxy, not a compensation or wage construct.
retained_limitations: It is not a wage, payroll, labor-income, or compensation construct.

label: ECB Wage Tracker coverage
decision_reason: Coverage is a source-quality diagnostic, not a wage-pressure response variable.
retained_limitations: Useful for revision and representativeness checks only.

label: Euro area real compensation per employee, quarter-end observed
decision_reason: Conceptually direct, but observed only at quarter-end; the monthly thesis layer does not interpolate it.
retained_limitations: Sparse quarter-end observations are not a valid monthly compensation proxy without interpolation.

label: Eurostat labour-cost index
decision_reason: quarterly, not a monthly compensation proxy
retained_limitations: Not retained in the active monthly empirical layer.

label: Eurostat compensation per employee
decision_reason: national-accounts compensation per employee is quarterly, not monthly
retained_limitations: Not retained in the active monthly empirical layer.

label: Eurostat job vacancy rate
decision_reason: job vacancy statistics are quarterly, so they are rejected for monthly LP responses
retained_limitations: Not retained in the active monthly empirical layer.

label: sector-specific ECB negotiated wages
decision_reason: ECB EWT API exposes only total-economy monthly wage-tracker series in this vintage
retained_limitations: Not retained in the active monthly empirical layer.

label: services ECB negotiated wage pressure
decision_reason: no separate monthly services EWT wage series is exposed; services employment expectations are retained only as an indirect proxy
retained_limitations: Not retained in the active monthly empirical layer.

label: core negotiated wage pressure outside ex-one-offs
decision_reason: the available monthly core-like EWT measure is the excluding-one-offs series; no additional official core EWT series is exposed
retained_limitations: Not retained in the active monthly empirical layer.

label: Eurostat services wage bill
decision_reason: searched STS services wage-bill dimensions do not return usable euro-area/German monthly observations in the official API query
retained_limitations: Not retained in the active monthly empirical layer.

label: Eurostat retail wage bill
decision_reason: searched STS trade wage-bill dimensions do not return usable euro-area/German monthly observations in the official API query
retained_limitations: Not retained in the active monthly empirical layer.

label: payroll/employment-income micro proxy
decision_reason: no reproducible public monthly official euro-area payroll micro proxy was found
retained_limitations: Not retained in the active monthly empirical layer.

label: Indeed wage tracker
decision_reason: not retained because the public official-source reproducibility standard is not met
retained_limitations: Not retained in the active monthly empirical layer.

label: PMI employment subindices
decision_reason: not retained because the series are proprietary and not reproducible from official public sources
retained_limitations: Not retained in the active monthly empirical layer.

label: negotiated pay settlements outside ECB Wage Tracker
retained_limitations: Not retained in the active monthly empirical layer.

label: monthly compensation per employee
decision_reason: not available as a real monthly series in local or pulled official sources
retained_limitations: Not retained in the active monthly empirical layer.
